src_model_base_v1.note: Transparent scenario model derived from the consolidated research. Not a claimed Waymo P&L.

src_cost_architecture.citation: Consolidated Robotaxi Cost Architecture Research Output v1
src_cost_architecture.note: Supports the three-layer taxonomy and double-counting controls.

src_depreciation.citation: Consolidated Robotaxi Depreciation and Residual Value Research v1
src_depreciation.note: Supports capex, useful-life and residual-value scenario treatment.

src_utilisation.citation: Sprint 2 Consolidation: Utilisation, Empty Miles and Paid-Mile Ratio
src_utilisation.note: Supports the 0.55 base paid-mile ratio and 45% to 65% scenario range.

src_energy_depot.citation: Sprint 3 Consolidation: Energy, Charging, Depot and Infrastructure
src_energy_depot.note: Supports direct running-cost and physical-enablement ranges.

src_ops_labour.note: Supports the existence and scenario treatment of local fleet operations.

src_scalability.citation: Robotaxi Scalability High-Confidence Consolidated Research v1
src_scalability.note: Supports the four scalability mechanisms and Layer 3 decomposition.

src_waymo_scaling.citation: Waymo, New Insights for Scaling Laws in Autonomous Driving, 13 June 2025
src_waymo_scaling.note: Supports ongoing training-data and compute productivity, not a dollar platform-cost estimate.

src_waymo_world_model.citation: Waymo, The Waymo World Model: A New Frontier for Autonomous Driving Simulation, 6 February 2026
src_waymo_world_model.note: Supports simulation as a continuing production activity.

src_waymo_driver6.citation: Waymo, Meet the 6th-generation Waymo Driver, August 2024
src_waymo_driver6.note: Supports sensor rationalisation and cost-down direction, but not an all-in vehicle-cost figure.

src_afdc_ev_maintenance.citation: US Department of Energy, Alternative Fuels Data Center, Maintenance and Safety of Electric Vehicles

src_waymo_swissre.citation: Waymo and Swiss Re claims-frequency research
src_waymo_swissre.note: Supports lower claim frequency, not a proportional insurance-premium reduction.
